description: Karaite betrothal deed, torn horizontally with the final few lines missing. Location: Cairo. Dated Tuesday, 11 Tammuz 5525 AM (1765 CE), The groom is Yosef b. Gedalyah b. Aharon and the bride is Esther known as Mas'uda bt. Sa'd b. 'Ezer b. Yeshu'a ha-Levi Rofe. The marital payments are listed accordingly: 50 kesif + 1775 medin + 200 medin +800 medin. AA/MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
